featured.title: Kongu Region's Election Results Show Dramatic Three-Way Battle
featured.summary: April 25, 2026 election results reveal a competitive contest with surprising upsets across eight districts. NDA, DMK, and ADMK in neck-and-neck competition for dominance.

sideNews.title: Counting Underway: Coimbatore Records 73% Turnout
sideNews.summary: Highest voter participation in two decades drives election commission officials to count through the night. Industrial sector shows strong engagement.

sideNews.title: Erode's Independent Surge Shocks Political Establishment
sideNews.summary: Preliminary counts show unprecedented success for independent candidates in Erode, signalling voter shift away from traditional parties.

sideNews.title: Salem-Namakkal Contest Reaches Thriller Finish
sideNews.summary: Final count expected by evening with victory margin likely under 1000 votes. Election officials verify every vote in tight race.

gridNews.title: Tiruppur Textile Sector Celebrates Pro-Business Exit Polls
gridNews.summary: Exit polls suggesting business-friendly policies trigger rally in manufacturing stocks. Industry leaders prepare investment strategies.

gridNews.title: Election Day Traffic: Kongu Highways Now Clear
gridNews.summary: With voting concluded, major highways across region see smooth traffic flow as campaign barricades are dismantled.

gridNews.title: Nilgiris Achieves Historic Tribal Village Turnout
gridNews.summary: Remote hill villages in Nilgiris record 68% participation with special polling stations set up in tribal settlements.

gridNews.title: Karur and Dharmapuri Deliver Shocking Results
gridNews.summary: Early exit polls from agricultural districts indicate surprising electoral shifts challenging pre-election political forecasts.
